title: quercus × warei
intro: Quercus × warei, also known as the hybrid oak tree, is a cross between Quercus ilicifolia and Quercus phellos, resulting in a unique species with combined characteristics of its parent trees. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Quercus × warei include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve lipid profiles, and exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. Quercus × warei can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being and promote healthy aging.
